message:
test(bd-10lt): add router registration, filtering, pagination, and mount tests

Add 89 new tests to router.rs across 4 test modules covering:
- TagFilters: include/exclude logic, case-insensitive matching, combinations
- Cursor encoding/decoding: roundtrip, error cases, invalid input handling
- percent_decode/from_hex: passthrough, encoding, truncation, invalid hex
- UriTemplate: unclosed param, specificity, debug/clone, edge cases
- Router: construction, add/get for tools/resources/prompts/templates,
  DuplicateBehavior (Error/Warn/Replace/Ignore), insertion order preservation,
  strict_input_validation, list_page_size, filtered accessors with session
  state and tag filters, apply_prefix/validate_prefix, MountResult,
  mount operations with prefix/conflicts/warnings, handle_initialize,
  handle_*_list pagination, handle_tasks_* without manager

Also fix pre-existing clippy warnings in handler.rs (missing semicolons
in closure bodies) and router.rs (Default::default() -> explicit type).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
